creator: freebsd@dreamchaser.org
text:
x11/glproto (and others: dri2proto, dri3proto, xextproto, videoproto) cannot install if xorgproto is installed:

pkg-static: glproto-1.4.17 conflicts with xorgproto-2018.4 (installs files into the same place). Problematic file: /usr/local/include/GL/glxint.h

11.2-RELEASE-p4 GENERIC amd64
